title: ANC - Change Transparency Mode value (Environment/Speech)
scenario: Verify that the selected Transparency Mode value (Environment/Speech) persists after closing and reopening the ANC tab.
steps: Change the Transparency Mode value to a different option (e.g., from Environment to Speech or vice versa).
Observe the Transparency Mode value displayed.
expected: The selected Transparency Mode value (Environment/Speech) should remain unchanged after closing and reopening the ANC tab.
